programme.title: High Noon
programme.desc: A town Marshal despite the disagreements of his newlywed bride and the townspeople around him must face a gang of deadly killers alone at high noon when the gang leader an outlaw he sent up years ago arrives on the noon train

programme.desc: Four college students become immersed in fantasy role-playing games causing tragic results; based on Rona Jaffes book

programme.title: Lion of the Desert
programme.desc: Set during the reign of Mussolini this epic tale revolves around Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar Omar an Arab Muslim rebel takes on the Italian attack which is directed towards conquering Libya

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: After discovering a sunken Japanese submarine the amateur skin diver who found it goes violently berserk

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: Gen Crowe orders Savage to fly a dangerous mission in France to show support for the resistance but he thinks its because hes in love with a beautiful fighter there

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Elizabeth makes plans to send David away to Boston Carolyn discovers Julia has been hypnotizing Victoria

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Julia realizes Barnabas plans to kill her when Carolyn attempts to steal her notebook

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Julia attempts to save herself by hiding her notebook in the grandfather clock After Carolyn snaps at Julia Elizabeth insists she apologize

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Attorney Tony Peterson arrives at Collinwood to berate Roger so Julia accompanies him back to his office and begs him to lock up her notebook

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: hen funeral director Ezra Thornberry gets his very polite young nephew Bobby as a roommate he eventually learns his rude harsh behavior towards him could be fatal

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Cold ruthless Kay Mason runs a garment factory and treats her illegal Mexican immigrant workers in a cruel inhumane manner Kay meets her match in Victor a handsome mysterious young Mexican in whom Kay develops an amorous interest

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A flashy businessman finds out he owns a slum apartment building and is unwilling to make repairs until strange things begin to happen to him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick secretly investigates a member of Internal Affairs as he searches for the reason behind a fellow officers suicide

programme.title: Friday the 13Th The Series
programme.desc: A girl finds a compact mirror that has the power to make others adore her and uses the cursed object to seek revenge against her sister

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A jittery airline heir Brett Cullen finds himself on a flight to hell Meanwhile a stewardess Lezlie Deane goes home with a charming passenger Ted Demers who may be too good to be true

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A cop learns that an illustrator of Tales from the Crypt might have the power to make his monstrous creations come to life due to his shrewish wife

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa volunteers for a lodge job to shame Luke for refusing it and then finds the task is to assist in answering lodge letters but because he is too vain to announce his illiteracy creates chaos faking the assignment

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max enters the world of art looking for an art thief know as Bronzefinger

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS is using parrots to learn secret formulas and then KAOS smuggles them out of the country

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ comes to Bishop and quickly becomes entangled in a war between Heavens Devils and the Road Runners two rival motorcycle gangs led by the feuding Delano brothers Will BJ and Captain Cain realize that the enemy of my enemy is my friend and team up against a common foe

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur buys a pair of pearl earrings as a surprise for Carol on her birthday but a home burglar has other plans for them

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Both Carol and Ed want Wilbur to hire a famous decorator to redo the house and stable in a Hawaiian Modern motif

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: While awaiting word to complete a sabotage mission Stalag 13 gets a new officer under Klink - Burkhalters alert brother-in-law who enjoys tormenting prisoners

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: In using Schultz to deliver radio parts to the underground Hogan causes a marital tiff which to fix requires getting Klink to believe that his sergeant is dying from premature old age

programme.title: Mchale 320
programme.desc: Mchale 320

programme.title: Mchale 312
programme.desc: Mchale 312

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While sitting in a restaurant Gomer witnesses an automobile accident between Sergeant Carter and another driver When in court Gomer takes the oath seriously to tell the truth the whole truth and nothing but the truth

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: When Gomers cousin Goober shows up in the barracks and puts on one of Gomers uniforms and then wanders the base everyone sees the name Pyle on the uniform and thinks Gomer is losing his mind

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A satellite bound for Mars lands on the island The castaways hope to use it to provide visual evidence to the world that they are still alive

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan wins a million-dollar sweepstakes and is invited to the Howells country club After feeling lonely he issues IOUs to the others so they may also attend He quickly misplaces the winning ticket and they all get evicted

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa volunteers for a lodge job to shame Luke for refusing it and then finds the task is to assist in answering lodge letters but because he is too vain to announce his illiteracy creates chaos faking the assignment

programme.title: Avenging Force
programme.desc: A senator is targeted by the Pentangle a right wing paramilitary group His pal a former CIA agent and martial artist tries to help him The group kidnaps the agents sister and tries to hunt him down The Most Dangerous Game style

programme.title: Enter the Ninja
programme.desc: After passing a ninja master test in Japan Cole visits a war buddy in the Philippines He helps him fight men who want his buddys plantation

programme.title: The Perfect Weapon
programme.desc: An expert in kenpo karate avenges his Koreatown friend slain by a mobster in Los Angeles

programme.title: Laser Mission
programme.desc: Action superstar Brandon Lee portrays rebellious government agent Michael Gold who is sent on a desperate mission to a Soviet-controlled African nation in order to uncover a top-secret laser weapons operation and destroy it

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget protects armoured cars from Dr Claw

programme.title: Hercules 212
programme.desc: Hercules 212

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: As the election draws near Liam believes Zoor is trying to have Jonathan Doors murdered The Resistance worries that an attack is imminent at the final debate Julia mobilizes a group to protect Doors against Liams wishes

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Wanting to set off a tribal war within the human race the aliens attempt to detonate a nuclear bomb at a US-Soviet disarmament summit

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Space1999
programme.desc: While exploring an Earth-type world several Alphans including Commander Koenig and Dr Russel disappear after sighting a strange fog Shortly afterwards a race of primitive humans are encountered

programme.title: Dreamscape
programme.desc: A man who can enter and manipulate peoples dreams is recruited by a government agency to help cure the President of the United States of his nightmares about nuclear war but stumbles upon an assassination plot

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: The Dukes efforts to reform old-time moonshiner Hard Luck Jones runs into plenty of roadblocks when he hijacks a tank to use as a rolling brewery Bo and Luke have to convince Jones to stop his illegal activities before they wind up in federal prison

programme.title: Hercules 215
programme.desc: Hercules 215

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: After a mob enforcer still wearing his brass knuckles falls to death from a high-rise hotel window the police seal off the hotel and hunt for two other mobsters and the down-and-out boxer who was their planned target

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The IMFs target is Poltroni an international drug dealer Poltroni alias Ted Carson is in a country with no extradition treaty with the United States Briggs devises a plan to lure Poltroni to a neighboring country where he can be arrested and sent to the US To execute the scheme Barney will have to fight for his life against one of Poltronis thugs while Cinammon will be bait for Poltroni Also getting Poltroni to the border wont be easy Its about 100 miles away

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A woman invites Friday and Gannon to talk to her Womans Club about battered children They train the women to be on the lookout for children who might be abused and how they can help by becoming foster parents

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon go undercover at a hotel to find the location of an illegal gambling operation Soon after spreading the word theyre looking for some action they are driven to a late-night game in the Hollywood Hills After the game the detectives give the location of the residence to their boss and a raid is set for the following night

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Dr Kimble is in Connecticut working for a man who is conspiring with his mistress to murder his wife and blame it on him

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: The Barkleys prepare for the unveiling of a statue dedicated to family patriarch Tom prompting Victoria to visit Heaths birthplace and learn about Toms secret past

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne working for the less than scrupulous Ben Creed as foreman crosses paths with stock owner Thora Flagg who needs help moving her herd to town She engages Creed in a poker game to win the price to cross his land and Cheyenne

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: Missing in Action 3
programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.desc: A martial artist must defeat a plan by ninjas to create a worldwide training camp for terrorists

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The Lightning League stumbles upon a parasitic colony of creatures living on Monster Minds vines; Gillian discovers that the vines are concealing the Liberty Stone

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: MASK travels to Africa to stop a botched experiment which has created a deadly blue slime consuming everything in its path VENOM learns of the slime and seeks to control it in order to take the world hostage

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: An ex-minister from West Germany hires VENOM to help him spread a virus that turns money bills into blank pieces of paper

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Brothers of Light and Shadow

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Reunion in the Wilderness

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain is hypnotizing residents of an Earth-like world with a special kind of newspaper ink The N team encounters a guy named Julio who tries to get to the bottom of this hypnotic business and is the only one who is not under the effect of the hypnosis The N team discovers that Julio is actually illiterate

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin is feeling under the weather since he caught a video virus His friends must help him so they shrink themselves and go inside Kevins body to fight the virus

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Pirate Island

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brains Caribbean holiday is interrupted by a gang of MAD pirates

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill and Dr Braxis join forces to steal an experimental energy crystal

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Leader-1 is shot by Crasher while attempting to destroy Cy-Kills pulsar generator

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Jayce and the Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The root which only responds to Audric or something belonging to him reacts to the Planet Xiang which leads Jayce and Herc there even though it is a planet controlled by Saw Boss They discover a message from Audric on a vase but before they can get it it is stolen Jayce and Herc and Oon are drawn further into the city where Saw Boss has laid a trap for Jayce Jayce and Oon fall into a pit which is slowly being consumed by fire; but Herc Gillian and Flora come to the rescue Safely aboard the Pride they decode the message which is revealed to be too old to be of much use
